title: Runtime Validation, Parsing, and Trust Boundaries · Inference Brief: Schema Evolution
summary: Parse API, storage, URL, form, and message values into trustworthy domain records without unsafe casts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts schema evolution increment in a runtime-validated public data adapter. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Handle required, optional, deprecated, defaulted, and versioned fields with changed-schema fixtures.
Build parsers that return typed values or structured failure paths rather than booleans that discard evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
